inputs.label: Principal Amount
inputs.businessContext: Initial lump sum investment or loan amount

inputs.label: Monthly Contribution
inputs.businessContext: Additional fixed amount added each month (0 if none)

formulas.totalAmount: principal * Math.pow(1 + annualInterestRate/100/12, years*12) + monthlyContribution * ((Math.pow(1 + annualInterestRate/100/12, years*12) - 1) / (annualInterestRate/100/12))
formulas.totalInterest: (principal * Math.pow(1 + annualInterestRate/100/12, years*12) + monthlyContribution * ((Math.pow(1 + annualInterestRate/100/12, years*12) - 1) / (annualInterestRate/100/12))) - (principal + monthlyContribution * years * 12)
